rulings.Case Title: CAITLIN FITTING et al VS. PAUL KRAAIJVANGER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Prepare / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Leave To Prepare A Settled Statement In Lieu Of A Reporter'S Transcript
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing for Tuesday, February 7, 2017, line 1. PLAINTIFFS CAITLIN FITTING, GLORIA GUTIERREZ, MAXIMILIANO VALLE, EDWARDO GUTIERREZ, MARIA VALLE, FELIZ-ALBERTO VALLE, LUISA VALLE, TERESA VALLE'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Prepare A Settled Statement In Lieu Of A Reporter's Transcript. GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. The timely motion as to the January 3, 2017 order is granted; the untimely motion as to August 11, 2016 (Designation of Record filed on November 15, 2016) is DENIED. NO authority cited for the proposition that "amended" untimely designation is proper. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TERRA NOVA INDUSTRIES, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. M/M WINE REALTY, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Paolo Mancini'S Cross-Complaint Filed In Violation Of Stay Of Action
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing for Tuesday, February 7, 2017, line 2. CROSS DEFENDANTS BIG WINES, INC., BRIAN MCGONIGLE'S Motion To Strike Paolo Mancini's Cross-Complaint Filed In Violation Of Stay Of Action. GRANTED. November 9, 2016 Cross-Complaint is stricken. June 7, 2016, July 28, 2016 and October 7, 2016 (and any response thereto) cross-complaints are stayed pending arbitration per October 17, 2016 stipulation and order. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARK GENKIN VS. LEONID TRUBNIKOV ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing for Tuesday, February 7, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANT LEONID TRUBNIKOV'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. GRANTED, subject to opposition. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RICHARD MICHAEL LIEBERMAN VS. CHARLES FOX ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing for Tuesday, February 7, 2017, line 5. DEFENDANT CHARLES FOX'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint is sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Notice is sufficient. =(501/REQ)
